languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

languages.text: "Правильно ли я понимаю ситуацию: ксеносы спокойно проникли на одну из важнейших планет протектората фон Валанциус, чтобы забрать оттуда останки малатека, и никто этого даже не заметил?"
languages.translation_comment: found in the Trazyn Museum the remains of a fabricator from Kjava Gamma (our planet)

"Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"
"Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

languages.text: 「状況を正しく理解しているでしょうか。異星人は、フォン・バルアンシウスの保護領で最も重要な惑星の一つに、静かに侵入してマレテクの遺体を回収し、誰も気づかなかったのです」
languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

traits.locale_text: 「状況を正しく理解しているでしょうか。異星人は、フォン・バルアンシウスの保護領で最も重要な惑星の一つに、静かに侵入してマレテクの遺体を回収し、誰も気づかなかったのです」

languages.text: « Dites-moi si j'ai bien saisi la situation : le xénos s'est infiltré sur l'une des planètes les plus importantes du protectorat von Valancius pour récupérer la dépouille du malatek, et personne n'a rien remarqué ? »
languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

traits.locale_text: « Dites-moi si j'ai bien saisi la situation : le xénos s'est infiltré sur l'une des planètes les plus importantes du protectorat von Valancius pour récupérer la dépouille du malatek, et personne n'a rien remarqué ? »

languages.text: "Habe ich die Situation richtig erfasst? Der Xenos hat heimlich einen der wichtigsten Planeten des Valancius-Protektorats infiltriert, um die Reste der Malatek zu bergen, und niemand hat etwas bemerkt?"
languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

traits.locale_text: "Habe ich die Situation richtig erfasst? Der Xenos hat heimlich einen der wichtigsten Planeten des Valancius-Protektorats infiltriert, um die Reste der Malatek zu bergen, und niemand hat etwas bemerkt?"

languages.text: "Durumu doğru mu anladım? Zenolar, teküfranın kalıntılarını almak için von Valancius protektorasındaki en önemli gezegenlerden birine sessizce sızdı ve kimse fark etmedi bile, öyle mi?"
languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

traits.locale_text: "Durumu doğru mu anladım? Zenolar, teküfranın kalıntılarını almak için von Valancius protektorasındaki en önemli gezegenlerden birine sessizce sızdı ve kimse fark etmedi bile, öyle mi?"

languages.text: «A ver si lo he entendido correctamente: el xenos se infiltró discretamente en uno de los planetas más importantes del protectorado de von Valancius para hacerse con los restos del malatek, ¿y nadie se ha enterado?».
languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"

traits.locale_text: «A ver si lo he entendido correctamente: el xenos se infiltró discretamente en uno de los planetas más importantes del protectorado de von Valancius para hacerse con los restos del malatek, ¿y nadie se ha enterado?».

languages.text: “我的理解没错吧：异形悄然渗透进冯·瓦兰修斯属地中最为关键的行星之一，只为取走黑暗贤者的遗骸，而整个过程无一人察觉？”
languages.original_text: "Have I grasped the situation correctly: the xenos quietly infiltrated one of the most important planets in the von Valancius protectorate to retrieve the malatek's remains, and no one even noticed?"
